texto: Immobilization: A state, however mild or serious, in which you are not functioning at the level that you would like to. If feelings lead to such a state, you need to look no further for a reason to get rid of them.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Wayne W. Dyer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “Immobilization: A state, however mild or serious, in which you are not functioning at the level t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, feelings, functioning pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de functioning e immobilization.

texto: Authentic empowerment is the knowing that you are on purpose, doing God's work, peacefully and harmoniously.

texto: Make peace with silence, and remind yourself that it is in this space that you'll come to remember your spirit. When you're able to transcend an aversion to silence, you'll also transcend many other miseries. And it is in this silence that the remembrance of God will be activated.

texto: Passion is a feeling that tells you: this is the right thing to do. Nothing can stand in my way. It doesn't matter what anyone else says. This feeling is so good that it cannot be ignored. I'm going to follow my bliss and act upon this glorious sensation of joy.
explicacao: Citação de Wayne W. Dyer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Passion is a feeling that tells you: this is the right thing to do.
